basic_info.headline: Payments & Financial Services Business Strategy at eBay
basic_info.about:
Pravin is currently a Director in the Payments Business Strategy team at eBay, overseeing the buyer payments roadmap, including the addition of news forms of payment to checkout globally and enabling buyer segments via new payment solutions. He leverages his diverse background in strategy, operations, risk management, financial services and his unique work experiences (ranging from management consulting, investment banking, actuarial science, and public sector) to identify problems, develop strategic insights, and drive successful execution. 

His interests include advising start-ups and small businesses, teaching, investing and new technologies (e.g., artificial intelligence, machine learning, cryptocurrency). Pravin has an Honours Bachelors Degree in Mathematics from the University of Waterloo and an Honours Business Administration Degree in Finance from Wilfrid Laurier University. He has received Alumni Gold Medals from both universities.

experience.title: Management Consultant
experience.description:
Worked on strategic, operational, and risk management projects in the Financial Services industry. Progression: Consultant (2 years), Senior Consultant (1 year), Associate in Insurance practice (2 years), and operated as an Engagement Manager in my last year at OW.

Associate/Engagement Manager project experience (responsible for day-to-day leadership):
* Development of strategic risk management approach for a pension fund
* Due diligence for an investment company considering purchasing a Bermuda-based (re)insurer
* Development of strategic options for an insurer de-risking its legacy fixed annuity products 

Associate project experience (responsible for leading projects and individual work streams):
* Due diligence for a portfolio company considering entering the US reinsurance market
* Publication of a detailed whitepaper about Variable Annuity volatility management strategies
* Development of a standardized product management process for the auto division of an insurer
* Corporate strategy project to articulate the current and future state of the retail arm of an insurer

Senior consultant project experience (responsible for ownership over individual work streams):
* Thought partnership in determining the financial and valuation metrics for an insurer
* Project management to help an insurer implement its regulatory compliance strategy
* Development of an economic capital framework for an insurer
* Development of a roadmap to help an insurer comply with data governance/reporting standards

Consultant project experience (support analysis and research of individual or multiple work streams)
* Development an alternative asset (private equity, real estate) volatility model for a pension fund
* Validation and documentation of risk pricing models for global and national banks (Canada/US)
* Development of market strategy for a transaction processing firm facing a decline in revenue
* Articulation of wellness strategy for a large state health insurer

experience.title: Investment Banker
experience.description:
Investment Banking Analyst in the Diversified Industries group in the BMO Capital Markets group.

Key accomplishments:
* Researched companies in the retail, chemicals, airline, private equity, and forestry industries in completion of pitch decks and various technical analyses
* Prepared valuations using public company comparables, precedent transactions, and discounted cash flow analyses

experience.title: Management Consultant
experience.description:
Consultant in the Oliver Wyman New York office. Project experience involved assisting the senior management team of a Fortune 500 multi-line insurance company transition its foreign business hedge projections to the United States.

Key accomplishments:
* Involved in execution of project to generate hedge cash flows and market values that were used to produce reserve and capital numbers; required strong understanding of option pricing
* Designed, created and tested validation tools for checking client deliverable results
* Prepared weekly summary presentations for working group meetings with clients
* Developed tools in Python to compress client’s Variable Annuity liabilities into a 300x smaller portfolio to aid in reducing processing time of in-force analysis
